headline: Defense Stocks Are Stabilizing. When to Buy.
summary: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF rallied 23% to $250, then fell 16% to $210. It is now stabilizing around $217.

headline: Why Lockheed Martin Stock Fell 14.3% in April
summary: Defense contractors are struggling after a bump earlier in the year due to the outbreak of the conflict in Iran.

headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps 5%, S&P 500 Drops As Iran Strikes UAE Port
summary: U.S. stocks sank Monday as an Iranian drone attack on a UAE petroleum site sent Brent above $114, gold tumbled 2%, and FedEx, UPS and GXO cratered after Amazon expanded its logistics business

headline: Lockheed Martin Awarded U.S. Space Force Space-Based Interceptor Contracts to Meet Layered Missile Defense Demand

headline: Tracking AMG's Yacktman Asset Management Portfolio - Q1 2026 Update
summary: Yacktman Asset Management's Q1 2026 13F portfolio rose to ~$7.5B, with 76 holdings and 11.5% cash, led by Canadian Natural Resources at 10.75%. View the full analysis here.
